name: 72nd Street Courts
description: Come play pickleball at 72nd Street Courts in Gladstone, MO! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to lights, restrooms, and water.

name: Kearney Pickleball Courts
description: Kearney Pickleball Courts is a place to play pickleball in Kearney, MO. There are 12 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights. Reservations are not available. The courts are free.

name: Liberty Community Center
description: Liberty Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Liberty, MO. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to restrooms. You can reserve the courts.

name: North Kansas City YMCA
description: North Kansas City YMCA is a place to play pickleball in North Kansas City, MO. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can reserve the courts. A membership is required to play. Amenities include lights.

name: Northland Racquet Club
description: Note. Schedule can change. If we have early morning open play we start at 7 am. We might also schedule open play beyond 9 pm. See website for event times. NRCtennis.com
open_play_schedule: Note. Schedule can change. If we have early morning open play we start at 7 am. We might also schedule open play beyond 9 pm. See website for event times. NRCtennis.com

name: The Athlete Factory
description: The Athlete Factory is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Glenaire, MO. There are 2 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Westboro/Canterbury Pickleball Courts
description: Westboro/Canterbury Pickleball Courts is a place to play pickleball in Liberty, MO. There are 8 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are not available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights and restrooms.
